so please ensure that their values always match the ones with the
same name in TaskInstanceState.

TaskCallbackRequest.description:
Task callback status information.

A Class with information about the success/failure TI callback to be executed. Currently, only failure
callbacks when tasks are externally killed or experience heartbeat timeouts are run via DagFileProcessorProcess.
TaskCallbackRequest.title: TaskCallbackRequest

TaskInstance.description: Schema for TaskInstance model with minimal required fields needed for Runtime.
TaskInstance.title: TaskInstance

TaskInstanceState.description:
All possible states that a Task Instance can be in.

Note that None is also allowed, so always use this in a type hint with Optional.
TaskInstanceState.title: TaskInstanceState

VariableResponse.description: Variable schema for responses with fields that are needed for Runtime.
VariableResponse.title: VariableResponse

DagFileParseRequest.description:
Request for DAG File Parsing.

This is the request that the manager will send to the DAG parser with the dag file and
any other necessary metadata.
DagFileParseRequest.title: DagFileParseRequest

LazyDeserializedDAG.description:
Lazily build information from the serialized DAG structure.

An object that will present "enough" of the DAG like interface to update DAG db models etc, without having
to deserialize the full DAG and Task hierarchy.
LazyDeserializedDAG.title: LazyDeserializedDAG

DagFileParsingResult.description:
Result of DAG File Parsing.

This is the result of a successful DAG parse, in this class, we gather all serialized DAGs,
import errors and warnings to send back to the scheduler to store in the DB.
DagFileParsingResult.title: DagFileParsingResult

AssetProfile.description:
Profile of an asset-like object.

Asset will have name, uri defined, with type set to 'Asset'.
AssetNameRef will have name defined, type set to 'AssetNameRef'.
AssetUriRef will have uri defined, type set to 'AssetUriRef'.
AssetAlias will have name defined, type set to 'AssetAlias'.

Note that 'type' here is distinct from 'asset_type' the user declares on an
Asset (or subclass). This field is for distinguishing between different
asset-related types (Asset, AssetRef, or AssetAlias).
AssetProfile.title: AssetProfile

MaskSecret.description: Add a new value to be redacted in task logs.
MaskSecret.title: MaskSecret

TaskState.description:
Update a task's state.

If a process exits without sending one of these the state will be derived from the exit code:
- 0 = SUCCESS
- anything else = FAILED
